title: Choose what your site will be about
testCase: Is there a heading with the topic you chose?
blocks.0.text: From here on, every lesson will add something to ONE page — yours. Not to random examples you delete afterwards. To something you will be able to show a person at the end.
blocks.1.text: So first decide what it will be about
blocks.2.text: Your favourite game. Your dog. A band you listen to. Your team. Your grandmother's recipe. A film you have watched ten times. Anything at all — as long as you care about it.
blocks.3.text: This is not a formality. If the page is about something foreign to you, you will just click "next lesson" and forget. If it is about something of yours, you will want it to be good.
blocks.5.text: Empty editor. Write a heading with your topic and one sentence below it — why you chose it. The two tags you know are enough.
blocks.6.text: Keep what you write. The next twenty lessons will build on top of it.
